title: Mr. Porky
description: A creepy mod that adds Mr. Porky, a mutated pig. Make sure to not kill any pigs.
body:
![Mr. Porky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4799747e7e8fc129ed397f722b7013469fd0cb58.png) > 🐷 "You shouldn't have killed that pig..."
Spoiler # ⚠️THIS MOD IS IN BETA⚠️ Gameplay mechanics, sounds, and visuals are subject to change based on player feedback. This mod was tested on NeoForge 1.21.4 and Forge 1.20.1. Compatability with other versions are not tested.
# 🐷 Mr. Porky - A Minecraft Horror Experience Mr. Porky is not just another mob, he’s a twisted experiment gone wrong. > “Don’t look away. He’s watching.” ## 🧟‍♂️ About the Mod Mr. Porky is a short-form Minecraft horror mod that brings tension, stealth, and panic into your world. When you kill a pig, something watches you... A grotesque, mutated pig-human hybrid known as Mr. Porky now roams the world. He hates light, stalks from the shadows, and hunts those who harm pigs. Your only hope? A single-use, flash-powered camera. ## 👁️ Unique Features • 🎥 One-Shot Camera Weapon A mystical camera that uses light to destroy Mr. Porky. but it only works once. Crafted with: 2 Diamonds, 2 Gold Ingots, and 1 Ender Pearl. ![Camera crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3209a98ea4516372184a06507a4309b2b51336ee.png) • **🧠 AI Behavior** > Mr. Porky prefers to lurk in the dark. Keep torches nearby… but don’t get too comfortable. • **🩸 Triggered Spawning Mechanic** > Killing any pig has a chance to spawn Mr. Porky. You won’t know when he appears, until it’s too late. • **🔊 Creepy Ambient Sound** > If you hear distorted pig squeals, run. He’s near. • **📷 Survival Horror Twist** > With no health bar or warning, Mr. Porky offers a high-stakes horror survival mechanic in a sandbox world. ## 🧪 Beta Status This mod is in beta, but stable for play. Future updates will expand AI behavior, add new scares, and polish the horror experience. [📥 Download the latest version](https://modrinth.com/mod/mr.-porky/versions) [🐛 Report issues or bugs](https://forms.gle/ezvbNz5jRy3LzmV27) ## 💖 Support Me Help me create more creepy (and awesome) stuff! Click below to support me on Ko-fi - every bit helps.

## 📜 License This mod is licensed under the MIT License.
